originalTitle: S&P 500 Stock Rockets Late On Earnings As Google Boosts Capex
summary: S&P 500 member United Rentals soared on stronger-than-forecast Q2 results after Wednesday's close as Google got a late-day haircut. AI data center construction has helped supercharge earnings for URI, which provides a one-stop shop for large construction projects. Google's plan to keep boosting capital spending suggests the demand environment for heavy machinery will keep shining, even as it may slow the pay-off for AI hyperscalers.
content: S&P 500 member United Rentals soared on stronger-than-forecast Q2 results after Wednesday's close as Google got a late-day haircut. AI data center construction has helped supercharge earnings for URI, which provides a one-stop shop for large construction projects. Google's plan to keep boosting capital spending suggests the demand environment for heavy machinery will keep shining, even as it may slow the pay-off for AI hyperscalers.
chineseTitle: 随着谷歌提高资本支出，标准普尔 500 指数股票收益大幅上涨
chineseSummary: 周三收盘后，标准普尔 500 指数成员 United Rentals 的第二季度业绩好于预期，因谷歌尾盘被削减，股价飙升。人工智能数据中心建设帮助 URI 增加了收入，该公司为大型建设项目提供一站式服务。谷歌继续增加资本支出的计划表明，重型机械的需求环境将继续保持光明，尽管这可能会减缓人工智能超大规模企业的回报。
chineseContent: 周三收盘后，标准普尔 500 指数成员 United Rentals 的第二季度业绩好于预期，因谷歌尾盘被削减，股价飙升。人工智能数据中心建设帮助 URI 增加了收入，该公司为大型建设项目提供一站式服务。谷歌继续增加资本支出的计划表明，重型机械的需求环境将继续保持光明，尽管这可能会减缓人工智能超大规模企业的回报。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
